app.name: PC Bareun
app.subtitle: PC Bareun
desc.services: Start, stop, and manage Windows services.
desc.startupManager: Manage programs that run at startup.
desc.programs: View installed programs and scan for leftovers.
desc.registryCleaner: Find and fix unused registry entries.
desc.debloat: Safely remove preinstalled Windows apps and block tracking.
desc.tempCleaner: Clean temp files, browser caches, and AI dev caches.
desc.duplicateFinder: Find duplicate files to save space.
desc.network: Real-time network monitoring and DNS tamper detection.
desc.winControl: Windows Update control & Ultimate Performance power plan.
desc.disk: S.M.A.R.T. health diagnostics, storage analysis, and Secure Erase.
desc.aiOptimizer: Scan AI models, manage Ollama, detect exposed API keys.
desc.portMonitor: Monitor dev/AI port usage and kill occupying processes.
desc.envManager: PATH diagnostics, dev tool versions, AI cache management.
settings.appDesc: A modern PC maintenance utility inspired by GoClean. Built with Tauri v2 + React 19.
settings.adminDesc: Some features like S.M.A.R.T., service management, and registry cleaning require admin privileges.
settings.autostartDesc: PC Bareun will launch automatically when you start your PC.
settings.supportDesc: Your support helps keep this project alive and growing!
settings.infoSummary: Feature requests, bug reports, and any feedback are always welcome!
settings.featureClean: 🧹 Clean — Temp files, privacy data, registry, duplicates
settings.featureOptimize: 🚀 Optimize — Startup management, memory optimization, bloatware removal
settings.featureSecurity: 🛡️ Security — DNS tamper detection, malware tool integration
settings.featureMonitor: 📊 Monitor — CPU/GPU temps, network speed, disk health
settings.featureControl: ⚙️ Control — Windows Update, power options, shutdown timer
dashboard.healthGood: Your system is in good shape.
dashboard.healthWarning: Some resources are running low. Maintenance recommended.
dashboard.healthBad: System needs attention. Immediate maintenance recommended.
dashboard.subtitle: Real-time system monitoring. (Auto-refresh every 3 seconds)
dashboard.uptimeWarning: Uptime exceeds 3 days. Rebooting may improve performance.
safety.services: Core Windows services are protected. Only third-party services can be managed here.
safety.programs: Runs the official uninstaller registered in Windows. No system files are directly deleted.
safety.registry: Only unused registry entries are scanned. Core Windows registry is never touched.
safety.debloat: Only Microsoft Store apps are removed. No impact on core Windows. Apps can be reinstalled anytime.
disk.secureEraseDesc: Permanently erase secondary drive data (Secure Erase / Zero-Fill)
process.desc: Kill unnecessary background processes to free RAM and CPU. System-critical processes are protected.
process.emptyTitle: Click "Scan Processes" to find killable processes.
debloat.desc: Manage bloatware removal, unused programs, and privacy tracking settings.
debloat.unusedScanning: Analyzing last usage of installed programs...
debloat.unusedNote: Based on file modification dates in the install folder. Click delete to run the Windows uninstaller.
debloat.unusedPrompt: Click "Scan" to find programs unused for a long time.
debloat.noUnnecessary: No unnecessary apps found. Your system is clean!
debloat.trackingDesc: Toggle off to disable tracking/advertising features. No impact on core Windows functionality.
debloat.safetyNote: App removal doesn't affect core Windows. Tracking settings modify the registry and can be re-enabled anytime. Some settings require admin privileges.
debloat.adminRequired: Admin privileges required. Please restart as administrator.
service.searchPlaceholder: Search services by name or description...
toast.cleanSkipped: ⚠️ {{count}} files skipped due to access denied
registry.backupDesc: Create a restore point before modifying the registry?
